arts.ttl: Gallery: The best images as Palace face Brighton
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are taking on arch-rivals Brighton & Hove Albion at Amex Stadium this afternoon – and you can enjoy the best images from Falmer in our live gallery below!

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Crystal Palace: Photos show hundreds of police officers as public protection order comes into force

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace ready to sell £14m player who signed new contract this year
arts.sum: The January transfer window is set to be an important one for Crystal Palace and in order to fund new signings during this period, the Eagles are ready to part ways with Odsonne Edouard. The striker joined the London outfit from Celtic in 2021 as part of a £14m deal with the Scottish giants and […] The post Crystal Palace ready to sell £14m player who signed new contract this year appeared first on CaughtOffside.
Today's the day. Oliver Glasner and his side head the AMEX Stadium to take on Brighton & Hove Albion - follow along here for LIVE updates from Falmer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners and Liverpool eye Brighton sensation
arts.sum: Premier League giants Liverpool and Arsenal are hoping to secure the signing of Brighton and Hove Albion striker Joao Pedro, according to reports. Earlier this month, a report from TBR Football said that Brighton would demand close to €120m for Pedro and they have no plans to let him leave in the near future.
